lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: I have no interest in talking to you just now outerlander.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I have some wallasalki bone fragments, and I understand you may be able to use them to make some armour for me...?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: I see great things in your future outerlander, but I will not go against the wishes of the tribe, and will not make armour for an outerlander.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: You may try and gain a dispensation from Chieftain Brundt, but I suspect you will be unsuccessful...

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: I have no interest in talking to you just now outerlander.

sections.title: When attempting to open the front door of Peer's house

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Hey! Outerlander! That is my house! Who do you think you are to just barge into my home without asking?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... My name is [player name].

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: It was a rhetorical question, outerlander. Now get lost. I do not appreciate intruders in my home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Peer.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Greetings to you [brother/sister] [Fremennik name]! What brings you to see me again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if you could give me a reading on my future...?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Ah, you would like a prediction? I do not see that that would be so difficult... wait a moment...

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Here is your prediction: The enemy called [fire giant/ghost/goblin/green dragon/hobgoblin/lesser demon/moss giant/ogre/skeleton/zombie] is your lucky totem this day.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a [battleaxe/crossbow/dagger/javelin/long sword/mace/scimitar/short sword/spear/warhammer] in combat today.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Here is your prediction: The place called [Al Kharid/Ardougne/Burthorpe/Canifis/Falador/Karamja/Varrock/The Wilderness/Yanille] will be worth your time to visit.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill [Agility/Cooking/Crafting/Fishing/Fletching/Herblore/Mining/Runecrafting/Smithing/Thieving] today.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Here is your prediction: The colour [black/blue/brown/cyan/green/pink/purple/red/white/yellow] will bring you luck this day.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number [one/two/three/four/five/six/seven/eight/nine/ten].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you bank my stuff?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing really, I just stopped by to say hello.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Well, hello to you too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I have some wallasalki bone fragments, and I understand you may be able to use them to make some armour for me...?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: As you wish, [Fremennik name]. What kind of armour were you thinking of exactly?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: I am afraid it will cost you 5,000 coins to make that for you... Is that okay?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Ah, a helm to make any seer proud! Did you want me to make you another while I am at it?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: As you wish, [Fremennik name]. What kind of armour were you thinking of exactly?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: My apologies [Fremennik name], but I will need you to bring me 1 piece of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 skull piece and 5,000 coins before I can make this helm for you.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: As you wish, [Fremennik name]. What kind of armour were you thinking of exactly?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: I am afraid it will cost you 10,000 coins to make that for you... Is that okay?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: The seers of legend all wore just such armour! Did you want me to craft you another piece?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: As you wish, [Fremennik name]. What kind of armour were you thinking of exactly?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: I am sorry [Fremennik name], but I need 3 pieces of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 ribcage piece and 10,000 coins to make you this armour...

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: As you wish, [Fremennik name]. What kind of armour were you thinking of exactly?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: I am afraid it will cost you 7,500 coins to make that for you... Is that okay?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Ah, I used to wear just such a piece of armour to battle in my youth... Do you want me to make you another pair of legs while I am doing it anyway?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: As you wish, [Fremennik name]. What kind of armour were you thinking of exactly?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: I am very sorry [Fremennik name], but I will require 2 pieces of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 fibula piece and 7,500 coins to make this type of leg armour.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: As you wish, [Fremennik name]. What kind of armour were you thinking of exactly?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't want anything.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: AS you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Peer.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Greetings to you [brother/sister] [Fremennik name]! What brings you to see me again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you help me with combining some items?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Combining items? What items?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this icon from a ring. I was hoping to make something new with it.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Surely a smith would be better placed to help you with that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I thought maybe you'd be able to help, given these are magic rings. The good magic that is... not the... whatever magic it is you don't like.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Hmm... So the things you're planning to make are totally above board?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: When you say above board, where would making new rings by combining the icons with ancient vestiges from a long forgotten empire sit?

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: What kind of empire?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Definitely not one known for using dark and forbidden magic.

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Ah, well as long as it's not one of those kind of empires, then I see no problems.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Now it's quite simple really...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: Not a problem.

sections.title: When using the right-click deposit-items option before completing the easy Fremennik Diary

lines.speaker: Peer the Seer
lines.text: I cannot do that for you until you have completed the easy tier of the Fremennik achievement diary.
